items.title: Huge $1,050 discount strikes Alienware’s 16-inch Area-51 RTX 5070 Ti 240Hz gaming laptop (All-time low)
items.summary:
Today only, as part of its daily deals offer, Woot has listed an Alienware Area-51 16-inch RTX 5070 Ti gaming laptop for $1,949.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). Configuring this same machine directly through Dell would cost you around $3,000, so you’re looking at over $1,000 in savings with this deal at Woot. Also, for comparison, Amazon has currently listed this variant at $3,074. Woot is offering the best price for this notebook right now, and it’s even $50 less than the previous all-time low we tracked for it last month when it hit the $2,000 mark. It delivers some serious value at its discounted price today, and you can learn more about it in detail below.

items.title: Anker’s updated SOLIX Spring Sale drops expanded 7,680Wh F3800 Plus to exclusive $3,608 ($3,690 off), more from $120
items.summary:
Update 3/17: Anker has increased discounts from its early-bird period up to 67% being taken off, as well as expanded offers, and added new FREE gift packages at certain pricing thresholds – lists/prices below have been updated. Be sure to use our exclusive code for bonus savings on orders over $1,000.

Anker has launched its Early Bird Spring Sale lineup with up to 65% discounts on its power stations, bundles, and accessories – including an exclusive bonus savings code, FREE gear with select models, and clearance/refurbished unit deals. One of the notable higher-end offers is on Anker’s SOLIX F3800 Plus Portable Power Station with an expansion battery at $3,608.10 shipped, after using the exclusive code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, which beats out Amazon’s pricing by $191. Coming down from its $7,298 full price, we’ve seen this particular bundle discounted regularly to $4,399 in 2026, with occasional falls lower to this same rate, most recently in a series of short-term Amazon lightning sales. While we have seen it fall to two lower prices in the past (during Black Friday and Christmas sales), you’re still getting a solid 48% markdown here that cuts $3,500 off the going rate, landing it at the third-lowest price we have tracked. You can also find the standalone station down at $2,374 shipped during this sale using the above code, with the rest of the massive lineup of deals available to browse below.

As part of its ongoing Spring Power Station Sale, you can pick up the Anker SOLIX F3800 Portable Power Station with a FREE Outdoor Kit ($189 value) down at $1,804.05 shipped, after using our exclusive savings code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, beating out its parallel Amazon pricing by $96. Don’t be fooled by the $3,999 MSRP that it’s listed with, as you can much more often find it starting down between $2,399 and $2,599 since mid-December. Discounts over the last few months have mostly been keeping pricing around $2,000, though we have seen some occasional drops to $1,899 and some flash sale cuts to the $1,799 low. The exclusive deal that only our readers can get here provides you with $795 off the going rate ($2,195 off the MSRP) landing it just $5 shy of the all-time lowest price we have tracked. Head below to learn more, as well as browse the lineup of deals for it and its upgraded F3800 Plus variant.

items.summary:
As part of its Spring EV Sale, Segway is currently offering its ZT3 Pro All-Terrain Electric Scooter down at $849.99 shipped, which also matches in price over at Amazon. Down from its $1,000 average price, despite it listed with a $1,300 MSRP, we’ve mostly seen this model discounted to $900, though there have been consistent drops to this same rate over the last year. While it did go a bit lower back during Christmas sales, as well as the short-term low in February, you’re still getting a solid $150 markdown here that gives you a premium upper-tier ride at one of its best rates over the last 12 months. You can shop the entire lineup of e-scooter deals in our original coverage of this sale event here.

items.title: Save $75 on this 40V Greenworks cordless electric combo kit with a 12-inch string trimmer + 390 CFM blower at $125
items.summary:
Amazon is offering a solid budget-friendly lawncare solution in the Greenworks 40V Cordless Electric Yard Tool Combo Kit with 12-inch auto-feed string trimmer and 390 CFM Leaf Blower at $124.99 shipped, which beats out the brand’s direct website pricing by $75. While you’ll find it carrying a $200 full price tag direct from Greenworks, it more often starts between $180 and $190 over at Amazon, though today’s deal is dropping from its full rate for once. This combo kit has seen regular discounts to $126 over the last year, with occasional dips going as low as $107. You’re looking at a solid 38% markdown on this legacy kit, which slashes $75 off the tag for one of the best prices we have tracked over the last 12 months. You can also check out Greenworks’ other tool deals in its official Amazon storefront here.
